nodes.text: Revenue increased 12% year-over-year to $45.2M, driven primarily by growth in the Enterprise segment. Operating expenses were well-controlled at 68% of revenue, resulting in a net profit of $8.7M. Key initiatives for Q1 2026 include market expansion in APAC and the launch of Product X.

runs.text: Revenue increased 12% year-over-year to $45.2M, driven primarily by growth in the Enterprise segment. Operating expenses were well-controlled at 68% of revenue, resulting in a net profit of $8.7M. Key initiatives for Q1 2026 include market expansion in APAC and the launch of Product X.

nodes.text: Enterprise segment growth was driven by three major contract renewals and two new logo acquisitions. The SMB segment saw steady growth from the self-serve channel. Consumer revenue remained flat, reflecting market saturation.

runs.text: Enterprise segment growth was driven by three major contract renewals and two new logo acquisitions. The SMB segment saw steady growth from the self-serve channel. Consumer revenue remained flat, reflecting market saturation.

nodes.text: Cost of goods sold decreased to 42% of revenue (down from 44% in Q4 2024), attributed to improved cloud infrastructure efficiency. R&D spending increased to 15% of revenue as the company invested in AI capabilities.

runs.text: Cost of goods sold decreased to 42% of revenue (down from 44% in Q4 2024), attributed to improved cloud infrastructure efficiency. R&D spending increased to 15% of revenue as the company invested in AI capabilities.

nodes.text: The company expects Q1 2026 revenue in the range of $46-48M, with continued margin improvement. The APAC expansion is on track for a March launch.

runs.text: The company expects Q1 2026 revenue in the range of $46-48M, with continued margin improvement. The APAC expansion is on track for a March launch.
